holdings.infoBox: CHAT is an equity ETF with a total of 45 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 6.82%, Alphabet at 5.43%, SK hynix at 4.47%, Broadcom at 4.20%, and Advanced Micro Devices at 4.08%.

overview.description: The Roundhill Generative AI & Technology ETF (CHAT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed fund that invests in 25 to 50 companies around the world that are involved in generative artificial intelligence and other related technologies. CHAT was launched on May 17, 2023 and is issued by Roundhill.
